zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注关键支撑表现
zh.content:
SOL/USD目前维持窄幅整理，最新价格84.87美元，日内波动有限，整体仍处于短线震荡区间。价格略高于20日均线，说明多头尚未完全失守，但反弹力度偏弱，市场情绪趋于谨慎。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持负值，显示短周期动能仍偏空，空头力量尚未完全释放。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格结构判断，当前并未进入明显超卖区域，预计后续仍以震荡消化为主。

关键支撑位首先关注84.58美元，若跌破则可能进一步测试83.80附近；上方阻力集中在85.30美元与86美元整数关口。若放量突破85.30，将有机会打开新的短线反弹空间。

操作上，激进交易者可依托84.50附近轻仓尝试短多，但需严格控制止损。稳健投资者则建议等待MACD重新形成金叉或价格有效站稳86美元后，再考虑顺势跟进，以降低震荡行情中的交易风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading near 84.87, sitting marginally below the session high of 85.30 and above the intraday low of 84.58, reflecting a narrow trading range and subdued short-term volatility. The price remains slightly above the 20-period simple moving average at 84.76, which suggests mild bullish structure despite the 24-hour decline of 0.41%. Buyers are still defending higher ground, but momentum remains limited without a decisive breakout above recent resistance.

Technical indicators present a mixed picture. The unavailable RSI(14) removes a common momentum confirmation tool, increasing reliance on price action and trend signals. MACD prints at -0.1206, indicating bearish momentum pressure remains present underneath the surface. Without a signal line comparison, confirmation is incomplete, though the negative MACD value suggests upside acceleration is currently weak. The market appears to be consolidating rather than establishing a strong directional move.

Immediate support is developing near 84.58, aligning with the session low and acting as the first defensive zone for bulls. A break beneath this area could expose downside movement toward 84.20 and potentially lower if selling pressure strengthens. Resistance stands near 85.30, with a stronger breakout barrier around 85.60. A sustained move above resistance would improve bullish sentiment and potentially attract momentum-driven buying activity.

Traders favoring shorter timeframes may watch for confirmation before entering positions. Conservative bullish strategies may look for price holding above the SMA(20) alongside stronger momentum confirmation. Bearish participants could monitor failed recovery attempts near resistance for potential short opportunities. Given the compressed range and mixed indicators, patience may offer better risk-adjusted entries until SOL/USD produces a clearer directional signal.
